comparison.ratedVoltageUe: 220V DC per pole (2A); 250V DC per pole (3-50A); up to 500V DC in 2P example
comparison.serviceBreakingCapacityIcs: Officially not found in checked Eaton FAZ-DC sources

specifications.label: Rated Voltage (Ue)
specifications.value: 220V DC per pole (2A); 250V DC per pole (3-50A); up to 500V DC in 2P example

specifications.label: Service Breaking Capacity (Ics)
specifications.value: Officially not found in checked Eaton FAZ-DC sources

specifications.label: Application Note
specifications.value: DC use only; do not map to PV string protection without dedicated PV confirmation

notes.title: Checked-source limitation
notes.body: Checked Eaton FAZ-DC sources confirm width and Icu 10kA, but do not explicitly state Ics.

notes.title: PV mapping held back
notes.body: The current Eaton research set does not confirm a dedicated IEC MCB line for pv-renewables. FAZ-DC is kept under OEM / machine building until PV-specific mapping is validated.
